### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06945-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Read Recent from Gmail

### Read Recent from Gmail

gmail — `getAll` operation against the connected account.

Next: Newest First

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Trim to Digest Size

### Trim to Digest Size

Caps the stream at 15 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Summarize Content (AI)

### Summarize Content (AI)

Map-reduce summarization chain — handles long content without blowing the context window.

Next: Post Digest to Gmail

### OpenRouter Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Summarize Content (AI)** as `languageModel`

🔑 OpenRouter API key

### Post Digest to Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Archive Digest in Airtable

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

airtable — `create` operation against the connected account.

Next: Send Summary to Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

# Summarize meeting notes with Airtable and Gmail on autopilot

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Summarize meeting notes with Airtable and Gmail on autopilot. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual q&a is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Read Recent from Gmail → Newest First → Trim to Digest Size → Summarize Content (AI) → Post Digest to Gmail → Archive Digest in Airtable → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating q&a in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Scales without extra headcount
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Airtable PAT; Google OAuth2; OpenRouter API key.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your q&a process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
